New polling in Italy shows 69.5% of Italians believe Italy should follow Spain’s lead and deny the use of U.S. military bases on its territory.

Only 15.9% disagree. 

A major signal of growing friction within NATO’s southern public sentiment.

🇧🇷 Polls in Brazil for this year's presidential election continue to show a tie between the incumbent Lula da Silva (80 years old, seeking his fourth term), and Flavio Bolsonaro (a Senator whose father, the former President Jair Bolsonaro, is imprisoned and barred from running).

New survey finds that 46% of American voters, including a majority of independents, believe Donald Trump is more responsive to Netanyahu on the Iran war than Americans. 

No president in history has ever faced such numbers when it comes to their loyalty to America first.



Drop Site (@DropSiteNews)

Scott Horton delivers a devastating history lesson that exposes how the US government and politicians blindly follow Israeli interests, leading directly to the death of innocent American citizens. 

He completely humiliates the Zionist guest Doran Spielman by proving that Israel intentionally demonized Iran to avoid peace with Palestine, and that American blood is being spilled as blowback for Israel's foreign policy.

We are proud to announce our new project: Raquetes dos Sonhos (Raquets of Dreams) 

This is a new project by the Instituto David Miranda, in partnership with Rede Abrigo, offering tennis lessons to kids living in orphanages and shelters for parentless kids.

David’s life was deeply shaped by the experience of adopting his children from a orphanage together with his husband and founder of the Institute, Glenn Greenwald, and then working to support those shelter.
